message:
test(patch): add 48 edge-case tests for DirtySpan/DirtyTracker/Patch/GridDiff (bd-2iaas)

Cover reversed/empty spans, u16::MAX boundaries, mergeable exact boundaries,
merge union/disjoint/subset, tracker mark_cell at last col, span clamping,
mark_row idempotency, double mark_row counting, resize to zero dims, clone
independence, row_spans OOB, three-way coalesce, merge_gap interactions,
ChangeRun empty/single/clone, Patch default/density/runs edge cases,
GridDiff old-vs-new size mismatch, diff_into reuse, multi-span dirty rows,
full-row vs span-row diff, all-cells-changed density, CellUpdate clone/debug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
